title: Policy Gradient Methods Path
description: Build fluency in Policy Gradient Methods inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG)
steps.summary: A model-free, off-policy reinforcement learning algorithm. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Policy Gradient Methods. Start after DDPG and Deterministic Policy. It opens into Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) Variants and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) Variants Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Deep Deterministic Policy Gradients (DDPG)
steps.summary: Deep Deterministic Policy Gradients (DDPG) belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Policy Gradient Methods. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Policy Gradient Methods. Start after DDPG and Policy Gradients.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: DDPG
steps.summary: DDPG belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Policy Gradient Methods. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Policy Gradient Methods. Compare it with Deep Deterministic Policy Gradients (DDPG) and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG). It opens into Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradients (DDPG).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
